name: same_supplier_2_name_variants_single_thread
description: Same supplier, 2 name variants, single thread
expected_output: Single supplier entity: Sharma (Supplier). One delivery task: Confirm exact delivery time today.
pass_criteria: PASS: Single supplier entity record created. FAIL: Two separate supplier records for 'Sharma ji' and 'Sharma bhai'.
challenge: Same supplier referred to as 'Sharma ji' (by Staff 1) and 'Sharma bhai' (by Ashish) in same thread. Agent must resolve both to one entity.
